subject: URGENT: Your service charged me twice this month
body: Hi, I just noticed two identical charges of $499 on my statement for the same invoice. This is the second time this has happened and I need it refunded today. Please escalate.

subject: Payment failed for invoice #INV-2231
body: We were unable to process the payment of $1,200 for your subscription. The card was declined. Please update your payment method to avoid service interruption.

subject: Your weekly digest: 5 articles you might like
body: Here are this week's top stories handpicked for you. Unsubscribe anytime at the link below.

subject: [ALERT] Production API is returning 503 errors
body: Our monitoring detected that the production API has been down for 4 minutes. Error rate is 100%. On-call engineer has been paged. This is a critical outage.

subject: 🔥 50% OFF EVERYTHING - 24 HOURS ONLY!!!
body: Don't miss our biggest sale of the year! Click now to claim your discount before it expires. Limited stock!

subject: Quick question about next week's roadmap sync
body: Hey, are we still on for the roadmap sync Tuesday at 3pm? Let me know if the time still works for you. No rush.

subject: Extremely disappointed - cancelling my account
body: I have been a customer for three years and the app has been broken for a week. Nobody responds to my tickets. If this is not fixed I am cancelling and posting a review everywhere.

subject: You appeared in 9 searches this week
body: See who's been looking at your profile. Upgrade to Premium to see all your search appearances.

subject: Invoice receipt - $89.00 paid successfully
body: Thank you. Your monthly hosting invoice of $89.00 was paid successfully. No action is required.

subject: Security alert: new sign-in on your account
body: A new device just signed in to your account from a location we don't recognize. If this wasn't you, secure your account immediately.
